name: Cream Cheese Swirled Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13 x 9 inch pan with Butter Flavor Crisco. Set aside.
3. For the filling: In a small mixing bowl, beat together Butter Flavor Crisco, cream cheese, and vanilla until well blended. Gradually add 1/2 cup sugar, then add 2 eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat in 3 tablespoons flour. Set aside.
4. For the brownie batter: Melt Butter Flavor Crisco in a large saucepan over low heat. Add 4 eggs one at a time, stirring quickly to incorporate each egg into the hot mixture. Stir in 1 tablespoon vanilla.
5. In a separate bowl, combine 1 cup Flour, all purpose, 1 teaspoon Baking powder, and 1 teaspoon Salt.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture to the chocolate mixture, stirring until just combined.
7. Pour half of the brownie batter into the prepared pan. Spread the remaining batter over it. Drop dollops of the cream cheese filling on top of the brownie layer, then spread gently to cover with more batter. Use a knife to swirl the two layers together lightly (be careful not to overwork).
8. Bake for 35 minutes. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
Makes: 2 dozen brownies.
